children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), this chapter shall take effect on .June 30, 2016

children.heading: Subchapter III and Subchapter VI
children.label: b Subchapter III and Subchapter VI

children.text: Subchapter III shall apply with respect to cases commenced under subchapter III on or after .June 30, 2016
Subchapters III and VI shall apply with respect to debts, claims, and liens (as such terms are defined in ) created before, on, or after such date.section 101 of title 11
